sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5543" key="a)mpuka/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμπῠκ-άζω</orth>, <sense id="n5543.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bind front hair,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κισσῷ καὶ στεφάνοισιν ἀμπυκασθείς</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13.6</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Phalaec.).</sense> </entryFree>
